title: Places+ mouldy additions
description: A small quickly made pack mainly for me and my friends that adds multiplayer features and some progression.
body:
This is my first modpack and is mainly just for me and my friends, it focuses on making the current version of places better with friends or alone.

The additions include: optimization mods, multiplayer additions like voice chat + long distance LAN, ways to obtain resources currently unobtainable or difficult to obtain within the places and some extra items to help with exploration or progression.
